allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const html = fs.readFileSync\('绘制预警框2.html', 'utf8'\); const jsMatch = html.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\); if \(jsMatch\) { try { new Function\(jsMatch[1]\); console.log\('JS syntax OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('JS syntax error:', e.message\); } } else { console.log\('No script found'\); }")
